name: Natural Language Dates
author: Argentina Ortega Sainz
description: Create date-links based on natural language.

name: Hotkeys++
author: Argentina Ortega Sainz
description: Additional hotkeys to do common things.

name: Rollover Daily Todos
author: Matt Sessions
description: Rollover any unchecked checkboxes from your last daily note into today's note.

name: Rollover Daily Tasks Advanced
author: DilpreetSinghh
description: Roll over uncompleted tasks from your previous daily note into today's note. Supports time-based filtering (HHmm-HHmm, HH:mm-HH:mm formats), chronological sorting by time prefix, and omit patterns for template tasks.
